relationships.context: workout_tracker exposes the upsert method for persisting sleep data
Each sleep session contains multiple sleep stages with timestamps and durations
The function consumes parsed Fitbit sleep log fields (log_id, efficiency, levels, duration)
Uses a database connection (conn) to persist sleep session and stage records
